Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x8000 "RAIDONBUNGELINGBAY-4600-8000" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $4600 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Raid on Bungeling Bay.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Added an init routine at $4600 which allows the helicopter rotors and engine sound to gradually spin up to speed when taking off for the first time: 1. Sets $42 to $08 2. Initialises the SID registers with the same data when the game is started from the disk version by Brøderbund
The loading screen is based on the disk version released by Brøderbund
